name: Myth Merch Studio
description: Turn symbols, phrases, and fandom lore into merch, collectible, and limited-drop concepts, then output a merch brief.
short_description: Translate fandom lore into merch and drop briefs.
audience: Merch leads translating community lore into product ideas
Creative directors mapping symbols and phrases to drop concepts
Talent and founder teams checking product meaning, rights, and manufacturing fit
detail_lines: Maps canon, iconography kits, phrases, price bands, product constraints, drop timing, and licensing boundaries into practical concept routes.
Exports concept rationale, phrase or symbol mapping, material notes, packaging ideas, drop framing, no-go ideas, and rights review.
Works only from public or user-authorized material and rejects unlicensed likeness use, collaborator appropriation, and empty scarcity pressure.
